Stack.P: The import pipeline is now stable. We finished the retry fix for customer_sync, and the nightly run completed without manual intervention.
The team tightened validation on customer IDs, removed one temporary bypass, and kept the rollout limited to staging. The result is a cleaner path to dashboard output.

Ul.Li: Confirm the summary totals match the warehouse export.
Review any records marked with H2O-style test labels.
Watch the next deploy window at 1030 for regressions.

Stack.P: For the deeper walkthrough, open the icon catalog or inspect the generated report after the next sync.
